name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.41: Phase 2 OTA app-update hosting. Per-machine GET /app-update manifest (machine-key) with backend-computed per-device rolloutEnabled, single active release model (cohort all/canary + halt), publish-time sha256 hashing, kiosk version reporting via header/query, and an ag-admin app-updates panel in Settings (publish, canary/all, halt-resume, fleet version table). Cumulative over v5.40.
